children.text: the maximum Federal estate tax rate, and
the inclusion ratio with respect to the transfer.

children.heading: Maximum Federal estate tax rate
children.label: b Maximum Federal estate tax rate
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a), the term “maximum Federal estate tax rate” means the maximum rate imposed by section 2001 on the estates of decedents dying at the time of the taxable distribution, taxable termination, or direct skip, as the case may be.
